About HSHome

Where Details
Make the
Difference.

Founded in Europe in 2021 and established in Dubai since February 2024, HSHome Interiors specialises in bespoke residential interiors, holiday home design, and investment-driven turnkey solutions.

We combine design expertise with hospitality knowledge — creating spaces that are beautiful, functional, and strategically aligned with your property's goals.

Years Experience

What We Do

Our Services

01
Residential Interiors
Bespoke interiors tailored to each client's lifestyle — from initial concept to final styling.
02
Holiday Home Design
Turnkey solutions built to elevate short-term rental performance and booking rates.
03
Full Fit-Out & Execution
End-to-end project management — planning, sourcing, construction and delivery.
04
Flip & Renovations
Smart, value-boosting renovations designed to maximise ROI on resale or rental.
05
3D Concepts & Renders
Visualise your space in photorealistic detail before a single nail is placed.
06
Styling & Handover
Photography-ready delivery — every property staged and ready from day one.

How We Work

A Clear Process.
Flawless Results.

At HSHome, we follow a seamless process to bring each project to life — from first consultation to final key handover.

01
Consultation
We begin by understanding your vision, lifestyle, and requirements.
02
Concept
Layouts, moodboards, material selections, and 3D renders.
03
Execution
Fit-out, sourcing, and installation managed with precision.
04
Handover
A fully completed space, ready to live in, rent, or sell.
